sglang.title: add sampling_scaling_penalties kernel
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Add a sampling_scaling_penalties kernel to reduce the GPU memory usage during the sampling phase when the scaling_penalties sampling parameter is applied (https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/blob/main/python/sglang/srt/sampling/sampling_batch_info.py#L247). This can eliminate the need for storing

Motivation
ref
#2846
#2752

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.

sglang.title: Add int8 quant kernel
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add int8 per token quant kernel for w8a8 quantization.
Kernel running time (ms) benchmark:
   batch_size   vllm op    triton  torch.compile
0         1.0  0.019568  0.010560       0.018944
1        16.0  0.018016  0.009280       0.030048
2        32.0  0.019008  0.010304       0.030304
3

sglang.title: Support FP8 E4M3 KV Cache
sglang.author: bjmsong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for FP8 E4M3 KV Cache, adapted from  vllm
Usage
python examples/runtime/engine/offline_batch_inference.py \
--model=${Llama-2-7b-chat-hf} \
--kv-cache-dtype=fp8_e4m3 \
--quantization-param-path=${sglang/test/srt/kv_cache_scales_llama2_7b_chat.json}

=============================

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Add markdown linter
vllm.author: rafvasq
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As a follow up to #11145 and related to #10366, this PR introduces markdown linting.
Rules currently modified in pyproject.toml:

Disabled line-length, there are currently 2002 infractions.
Disabled first-line-heading, because many docs use a sphinx-based heading target on the first line to cross-re

vllm.title: [Model] Initialize support for Deepseek-VL2 models
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #11236

Initialize support for deepseek-vl2 series models
Note that deepseek-ai/deepseek-vl2-tiny is not supported yet because it doesn't use MLA attention.

vllm.title: [Hardware][CPU] Multi-LoRA implementation for the CPU backend
vllm.author: Akshat-Tripathi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a Multi-LoRA implementation that works on the CPU backend. It's been tested with test_punica_sizes.py, test_punica_variation.py and test_layers.py
The main contributions are:

Enabling Multi-LoRA on CPU
Allowing CPU Multi-LoRA to be autotested
Providing fallback Pytorch ops for the Puni

vllm.title: [Hardware][TPU] workaround fix for MoE on TPU
vllm.author: avshalomman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a workaround to enable working with MoE models on TPU until the pallas fused_moe kernel is fixed.
It runs the experts in a loop (similar to mixtral_quant).
From internal testing, it is still usable in terms of latency.
FIX #10963

vllm.title: [V1][Core][1/n] Logging and Metrics
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY

Add logging to VLLM V1. For V1, we want to avoid doing work in EngineCore and doing full loops over Request data.
Architecture will work as follows:

For SchedulerStats, EngineCore will create in each step() and send  EngineCoreOutput.
For RequestStats, EngineCore marks the state of each re

vllm.title: [Model] Support GGUF models newly added in `transformers` 4.46.0
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #11970
This PR extends GGUF support for these models which has supported GGUF config extraction in transformers 4.46.0:

 Phi3
 Bloom (Failed due to fused QKV weights permute is required)
 Falcon (Transformers hardcoded config extraction with filename, causing failed to load some falcon-11b mode

vllm.title: [V1] [2/n] Logging and Metrics - `OutputProcessor` Abstraction
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

VLLM V1 design minimizes number of python loops over all items in the batch for performance. As we add metrics and logging, we need to loop over all items in the batch another time
This PR renames Detokenizer >> OutputProcessor.

All functionality that need to touch each item should implem

vllm.title: [MISC] fix typo in kv transfer send recv test
vllm.author: yyccli

vllm.title: [Bug] Fix usage of `.transpose()` and `.view()` consecutively.
vllm.author: liaoyanqing666
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Cooperate with @Fryezsh-edu
FIX #8630
FIX #11978
As I have said in the issue, this is a logic bug, which only occurs when USE_XFORMERS_OPS = False, so it is a little difficult to reproduce on common devices, but this bug really exists.

vllm.title: [CI][Spec Decode] fix: broken test for EAGLE model
vllm.author: llsj14
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#11672 (comment)
here was an issue in the above PR that caused broken tests and a CI test omission.
This PR fixes the broken tests and updates the test pipeline.
test
As follows, broken unit tests were passed in my local environments.
pytest ./tests/spec_decode/e2e/test_eagle_correctness.py
========

vllm.title: [Misc]Minor Changes about Worker
vllm.author: noemotiovon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: torch.cuda.synchronize() has been executed in the profile_run method. There is no need to repeat it externally.
